hero.headline: Practical technology education for the people building tomorrow.
hero.subtext: We help students and professionals build real, job-ready skills in software, data, and emerging technology.

about.heading: About Nova Technology Institute
about.body: Nova Technology Institute was founded to close the gap between classroom theory and real-world technology work. We design hands-on programs taught by practitioners, focused on the skills employers actually need.

items.title: Software Development
items.description: Foundations and advanced tracks in modern software engineering practices.

items.title: Data & Analytics
items.description: Practical training in data analysis, visualization, and decision-making.

items.title: Emerging Technology
items.description: Applied courses covering AI, automation, and the tools reshaping the industry.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.body: Have a question about our programs, or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.
